# discord_local_image (Data Source)

Reads a local image file and produces the base64 data URI the icon/avatar/emoji `*_data_uri` attributes expect.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read a local image file and expose it as a base64 data URI,
# ready to feed into icon_data_uri / image_data_uri / avatar_data_uri.
data "discord_local_image" "icon" {
  path = "${path.module}/icon.png"
}

# e.g. image_data_uri = data.discord_local_image.icon.data_uri
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `path` (String) Path to a local image file (`.png`, `.jpg`/`.jpeg`, or `.gif`).

### Read-Only

- `data_uri` (String) Base64 data URI of the image, e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`.
